reforms.description: The Ministry for Science and Technology is increasing access to the Internet in public and private schools and vocational schools, while also implementing a national plan for economic and social development to enhance human capital and infrastructure. Additionally, the government has increased the budget allocated to the Ministry, recognizing the importance of human resources for the development of R&D and technology diffusion.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing access to technology and increasing budget allocations for R&D are expected to improve educational outcomes and technological integration, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been put into action as part of the government's ongoing efforts to enhance educational and technological outcomes.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms involve significant structural changes aimed at improving human capital and infrastructure, which are critical for long-term economic development.
reforms.source_quote: The government has prepared a national plan for economic and social development to 2006, that aims at overcoming, within one generation, the economic and social gaps vis-a-vis European partners.

reforms.description: Portugal's Employment Action Plan includes measures to stimulate research and development in high schools and universities, promoting technology diffusion in the business sector, particularly among SMEs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Stimulating R&D in educational institutions and promoting technology diffusion among SMEs is expected to enhance innovation and competitiveness in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been enacted as part of the Employment Action Plan.
reforms.importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant effort to enhance R&D in specific sectors, although it is not as comprehensive as major reforms.
reforms.source_quote: Steps taken in high school, university and to promote technology diffusion in business sector, including SMEs.

reforms.description: Portugal has been a pioneer in the large-scale use of smart cards as electronic purses, which have gained increased acceptance by consumers and facilitated electronic transactions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The adoption of smart card technology enhances transaction efficiency and consumer convenience, contributing positively to economic activity.
reforms.status_evidence: The smart card system has been successfully integrated into the market and is widely used.
reforms.importance_rationale: While innovative, the initiative is a narrower reform focused on technology adoption rather than a comprehensive policy change.
reforms.source_quote: Portugal has been a pioneer in the large-scale use of smart cards as electronic purses.

reforms.description: A scheme has been introduced to exempt SMEs from social security contributions when they hire temporary replacements for employees undergoing training, aimed at enhancing workforce skills.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing the financial burden on SMEs during employee training, the scheme encourages skill development and workforce enhancement, which can lead to increased productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The scheme has been actively utilized by SMEs to support employee training.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is a targeted adjustment to support SMEs rather than a broad systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: A scheme has been introduced whereby SMEs are exempted from social security contributions if they recruit persons on a temporary basis to replace employees undergoing training.
